# Vendored library

`pdf-lib.esm.min.js` — [pdf-lib](https://github.com/Hopding/pdf-lib) **v1.17.1**,
the ESM build, used browser-side to fill the AcroForm character-sheet template
(`assets/pdf/shadowdark-character-sheet.pdf`) with actor data.

pdf-lib is **MIT licensed, © 2019 Andrew Dillon** — the full upstream notice is
in [`LICENSE`](./LICENSE) beside the bundle (and it ships in the release zip, so
the license travels with the code). It is self-contained (no runtime
dependencies) and is loaded via a dynamic `import()` from `pdf-sheet-export.mjs`.

The trailing `//# sourceMappingURL=…` comment was removed from the bundle
because the source map is intentionally **not** shipped; keep it that way if you
re-vendor. Do not otherwise edit — replace wholesale to upgrade, and refresh the
version numbers here and in `LICENSE`.

The template PDF and its field manifest are generated by
`dev/pdf-sheet/generate-sheet.mjs`.
